title: rosa canina subvar. oxyodonta
intro: Rosa canina subvar. oxyodonta, also known as the dog rose or fragrant dog rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina species, native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. oxyodonta include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing relief from digestive issues and menopausal symptoms. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
